description: Token-efficient code review knowledge graph: semantic search and call-graph resolution.
name: io.github.n24q02m/better-code-review-graph

environmentVariables.description: Ordered embedding model chain 'provider/model,...'; empty = local ONNX
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_MODELS

environmentVariables.description: Ordered summarizer model chain; empty = summaries disabled
environmentVariables.name: SUMMARY_MODELS

environmentVariables.description: DEPRECATED (honored one release): embedding backend override 'local' or 'cloud'. Use EMBEDDING_MODELS instead.
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_BACKEND

environmentVariables.description: Custom OpenAI-compatible base URL for cloud embedding (litellm passthrough). Optional.
environmentVariables.name: EMBEDDING_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: Custom OpenAI-compatible base URL for the LLM summarizer (litellm passthrough). Optional.
environmentVariables.name: LLM_API_BASE

environmentVariables.description: DEPRECATED (honored one release): single summarizer model as a litellm 'provider/model' string. Use SUMMARY_MODELS instead.
environmentVariables.name: SUMMARY_MODEL
